name: calabash-rolling-tool
functional_purpose: Roll the dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.reason: the cylindrical body serves as the main structure for the tool

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a small, flat head at the end of the cylindrical body
construction_steps.reason: the flat head helps to shape the dough

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a cylindrical handle at the other end of the tool
construction_steps.reason: the handle allows the robot to grasp and control the tool
